summary: Recorded the official public AG Digitalz Instagram handle as @agdigitalz while keeping all social accounts disconnected and blocked for live actions.
notes: Only public business metadata was recorded. TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn remain not_provided and pending_owner_input. Instagram remains not_connected, draft_only, approval_required true, live_posting_blocked true, and credentials_stored false. This does not authorize OAuth, account connection, posting, scheduling, analytics, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS changes, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, or Constitution changes.
